// src/utils/api.js
const envApiBase=(process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL||process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL||'').trim();const normalizedEnvApiBase=envApiBase.replace(/\/+$/,'');const ALWAYS_DATA_SITE='https://faithmutheu1.alwaysdata.net';export const API_BASE=normalizedEnvApiBase||(process.env.NODE_ENV==='production'?'':ALWAYS_DATA_SITE);export const buildApiUrl=path=>{if(!path){return API_BASE;}const normalizedPath=path.startsWith('/')?path:`/${path}`;if(!API_BASE){return normalizedPath;}if(API_BASE.endsWith('/api')&&normalizedPath.startsWith('/api/')){return`${API_BASE}${normalizedPath.slice(4)}`;}return`${API_BASE}${normalizedPath}`;};
